data.body: Follow-up from foolery-b7c0. Add a checked-in or documented harness that starts a local HTTP page with an unprompted random title, runs Codex and OpenCode non-interactively, and fails loudly unless the output contains a completed Playwright MCP navigation tool call, the observed title, and no approval-request/rejection/skipped-tool signal. Include a decision on OpenCode scope: current proof shows Codex per-server MCP approval works, OpenCode scoped permission.playwright does not approve generated tool permission playwright_browser_navigate, and OpenCode --dangerously-skip-permissions works but is broad.
data.title: Codify Playwright auto-approval harness
